title: Stop Pursuing Her. Start Pursuing Him.
caption:
She doesn't want to be your answer. She wants to be your choice.

The man who makes a woman his purpose gives her a weight she was never built to carry. She becomes his peace, his identity, his validation. And she can feel it — in the way he texts, in the way he deflates when she doesn't respond.

That's not love. That's a man outsourcing his wholeness to someone else.

The right order is God first. Not because the rules say so — because a man who gets that order right actually becomes someone worth marrying. The desperation goes quiet. The rootedness shows up. The woman worth finding is in the field you're already in.

"Seek first the kingdom of God, and all these things will be added." — Matthew 6:33

Save this for the man still waiting to be wanted.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #dating #marriage #discipleship
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
